title: Investigators return to Nancy Guthrie’s home
fullText: Deep snow impacts response to Massachusetts house explosion02:08Cuba says 4 people killed after gunfight with Florida speedboat01:56Cars sucked into sinkhole at Omaha intersection01:08FBI raids properties of Los Angeles schools chief01:27New questions over Epstein documents which have not been released by DOJ02:14Fourth grade class surprises student with uplifting messages01:16Trump focuses on economy in State of Union speech02:21Now PlayingUP NEXTTeen who lost leg to cancer scores long-awaited basket01:30Trump set for State of the Union speech in primetime04:02New risks from historic blizzard01:55Savannah Guthrie announces $1 million reward for any information leading to her mother03:03Lawsuit alleges insurance company provider list is a “Ghost Network”03:31Texas Congressman faces new calls to resign after texts revealed01:34Record setting blizzard slams Northeast02:39Blizzard causes massive power outages in New Jersey00:55President Trump reacts after alarming security incident at Mar-a-Lago01:33More than 30 inches of snow in parts of Massachusetts00:56American tourists scramble amid cartel violence in Mexico01:45Historic blizzard grounds nearly all air travel in Northeast01:00Nightly NewsUP NEXTDeep snow impacts response to Massachusetts house explosion02:08Cuba says 4 people killed after gunfight with Florida speedboat01:56Cars sucked into sinkhole at Omaha intersection01:08FBI raids properties of Los Angeles schools chief01:27New questions over Epstein documents which have not been released by DOJ02:14Fourth grade class surprises student with uplifting messages01:16
summary: One day after the Guthrie family offered a $1,000,000 reward for information leading to their mother’s return, there was a surge in law enforcement activity at her Arizona home. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz reports.
